metadata.name: Automate Red Hat Enterprise Linux Installation with Kickstart
metadata.description: Install Red Hat Enterprise Linux automatically based on a predefined configuration by using Kickstart
objectives: Make the file available by using the HTTP protocol
Install Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 by using Kickstart
prerequisites: Access to servera and serverc machines
Apache HTTP server running on servera

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Server hosting the Kickstart file via HTTP

tasks.name: Verify pykickstart package is installed on servera
tasks.description: The pykickstart package should be installed for Kickstart validation
hints: Install with: sudo dnf install pykickstart
This package provides ksvalidator for syntax checking

tasks.name: Verify Kickstart file exists in web root
tasks.description: The kickstart.cfg file should be published in /var/www/html
hints: Copy the file: sudo cp ~/RH304/labs/installing-kickstart/kickstart.cfg /var/www/html/
Ensure the Apache web server can serve this file

tasks.name: Verify Kickstart uses text install mode
tasks.description: The Kickstart file should specify text mode installation
tasks.success_message: Kickstart is configured for text mode installation
tasks.failure_message: Kickstart is not set to text mode
hints: Replace 'graphical' with 'text' in the Kickstart file
The text command should be on its own line

tasks.name: Verify guest-agents package group in Kickstart
tasks.description: The Kickstart file should include the @guest-agents package group
hints: Add @guest-agents to the %packages section
Package groups are prefixed with @

tasks.name: Verify vim-enhanced package in Kickstart
tasks.description: The Kickstart file should include the vim-enhanced package
hints: Add vim-enhanced to the %packages section
Individual packages do not need the @ prefix

tasks.name: Verify firstboot is disabled in Kickstart
tasks.description: The Kickstart file should disable the firstboot wizard
hints: Add 'firstboot --disable' to the Kickstart file
This prevents the GNOME Initial Setup wizard

tasks.name: Verify post-installation script in Kickstart
tasks.description: The Kickstart file should include a %post script with mandb and /etc/issue update
tasks.failure_message: Post-installation script is missing or incomplete
hints: Add a %post section at the end of the Kickstart file
Include 'mandb' to update manual page index
Include 'echo "Kickstarted on $(date +%F)" >> /etc/issue'

tasks.name: Verify student user exists on serverc
tasks.description: The student user should exist on the Kickstart-installed system
tasks.failure_message: Student user does not exist on serverc
hints: The Kickstart file should include a 'user' directive
Check the user line in kickstart.cfg

tasks.name: Verify serverc uses DHCP for networking
tasks.description: The serverc machine should use DHCP (auto) for network configuration
tasks.success_message: serverc is using DHCP for network configuration
hints: Without static network config in Kickstart, DHCP is used
Check with: nmcli con show ens3 | grep ipv4.method

tasks.name: Verify serverc uses LVM storage
tasks.description: The serverc machine should use LVM volumes (from autopart)
tasks.failure_message: serverc is not using LVM storage
hints: The autopart command in Kickstart creates LVM by default
Check with: lsblk

tasks.name: Verify /etc/issue contains Kickstart date
tasks.description: The /etc/issue file should contain 'Kickstarted on' from the post script
hints: The %post script should append to /etc/issue
Check with: cat /etc/issue

tasks.name: Verify manual page database is updated
tasks.description: The apropos command should find manual pages (mandb ran successfully)
tasks.failure_message: Manual page database may not be updated
hints: The %post script should run 'mandb'
Test with: apropos fstab
